1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/DrozmotiX/ioBroker.discovergy/blob/master/io-package.json).

3014.issue: [S3014] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3020.issue: [E3020] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3027.issue: [W3027] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" OS matrix is missing: windows-latest, macos-latest. Consider adding tests for all of: ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest.

5013.issue: [W5013] "gulpfile.js" found in repo! Think about migrating to @iobroker/adapter-dev package

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/DrozmotiX/ioBroker.discovergy/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#350] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/DrozmotiX/ioBroker.discovergy/issues/350)

8910.issue: [S8910] File "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml.OLD" was found. If it is no longer needed, consider deleting it.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/DrozmotiX/ioBroker.discovergy/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/DrozmotiX/ioBroker.discovergy/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
